close in.translate: 1) Приближаться, сближаться (о расстоянии) 2) Окружать, брать в кольцо
synonyms: Приближаться, сближаться (о расстоянии) - approach, near, draw near
Окружать, брать в кольцо - surround, encircle, enclose

examples.eng: The hunters closed in on the animal.
The police are closing in on the suspect.
The enemy troops are closing in.
The walls seemed to close in on him.
The army closed in on the city.
Fog closed in on the harbor.
They closed in on the target.
The lion closed in on the family of deer.
The enemy is closing in on the city.
Their daughters are close in age.
The days are closing in now that it is September.
With evening closing in we knew we had to find shelter fairly soon.
examples.ru: Близился вечер, и мы понимали, что нужно поскорее найти себе убежище.

examples.eng: The eagle closed in on its prey.
Most players are pretty close in fitness.
The youth threatened to close the old man's face in.
examples.ru: Молодой человек пригрозил набить старику морду.
